title: Celesta 32x | PvP Texture Pack
description: An amazing 32x PvP texture pack, Celesta immerses you in a world of unparalleled PvP experience that brings you into the battlefield with pure innovation!
body:
Prepare for PvP battles like never before with Celesta, a visually stunning 32x texture pack designed to enhance your competitive Minecraft experience. Featuring vibrant colors, sharp details, and smooth gradient textures, Celesta immerses you in a world of high-definition visuals and unparalleled PvP optimization. Dominate the battlefield with a clean and intuitive interface, customizable features, and regular updates that keep you at the forefront of the PvP scene. Elevate your PvP performance with Celesta and conquer the competition with style.

 

Supported Minecraft Versions:

Celesta v3.3 and older: 1.13 ➔ 1.20.1

Celesta v3.4: 1.20.2 ➔ 1.21.5
